name: worktree-pr
description: Safe worktree → PR → merge → cleanup workflow as a slash command. /worktree-pr:wt start <name> creates an isolated worktree+branch off origin's default branch; ship pushes it and opens a PR; finish merges the PR, removes the worktree, deletes the remote branch, and refreshes the default branch. Never touches the main working tree or a concurrent session's branch.
